name: Sigma Computing
description: Monitor Sigma Computing business intelligence platform for user access and data governance compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Sigma Computing as an Admin
2. Go to Administration > Developer Access
3. Click 'Create new' to generate API client credentials
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Enter them below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: From Sigma Administration > Developer Access > Create new client credentials

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The secret generated with your Client ID

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Sigma Computing workspace members with access to BI data

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Sigma Computing BI platform is operational
